problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
hypothesis: If Spintronics for low-power data storage is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
